name: Pentair plc
description: Pentair plc is a global leader in smart, sustainable water solutions, providing a wide range of products and services for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. The company operates through segments focused on aquatic systems, filtration solutions, and flow technologies. Pentair is dedicated to helping people and businesses move, improve, and enjoy water, offering innovative technologies for pool and spa equipment, water treatment, and fluid management. With a commitment to sustainability and efficiency, Pentair delivers essential water-related solutions that enhance quality of life and support critical infrastructure across the globe.
